name: Old Fashioned Caramels
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the brown sugar, molasses, and condensed milk to the melted butter. Bring to a boil.
3. Cut the unsweetened chocolate into small pieces and add them to the mixture. Stir constantly until the chocolate is fully melted.
4. Continue stirring the mixture until it forms a soft ball when dropped in cold water.
5. Add the vanilla extract and chopped nuts to the caramel.
6. Pour the caramel into a greased pan.
7. Allow the caramel to cool slightly.
8. When the caramel is firm, cut it into squares.
